settingsSupportSub: Our team is here to help you 24/7.
settingsAboutContent:
IBITI Guardian is a premium blockchain security suite dedicated to protecting digital assets in the evolving Web3 landscape. We provide real-time monitoring, advanced threat intelligence, and vulnerability assessment directly on your device.

Our Mission:
To empower blockchain users with institutional-grade security tools, ensuring every transaction is safe and every approval is transparent.

IBITI Guardian is developed with a privacy-first approach — your keys never leave your device.

Website: https://ibiticoin.com
Email: info@ibiticoin.com
settingsPrivacyPolicyContent:
Privacy Policy – IBITI Guardian

Last updated: 2026

IBITI Guardian is a mobile security tool designed to help users analyze token approvals and identify potential risks associated with smart-contract permissions.

1. Information We Do Not Collect

We do not collect or store:
• Private keys
• Seed phrases
• Wallet passwords
• Personal identity information

2. Wallet Address Usage

The public wallet address is processed locally for risk analysis only and is not stored on any server.

3. Blockchain Data

We read publicly available blockchain data through third-party RPC providers. All this data already exists publicly on the blockchain.

4. Local Storage

The app may store settings, language preferences, and monitoring configuration locally. No sensitive credentials are stored.

5. Security

All security analysis is performed using publicly available blockchain information.

6. Contact

For support or questions: info@ibiticoin.com
settingsTermsOfServiceContent:
Terms of Service – IBITI Guardian

Last updated: 2026

By using IBITI Guardian, you agree to the following terms.

1. Description

IBITI Guardian is a blockchain security analysis tool that helps users scan token approvals, identify risky permissions, and revoke them through their connected wallet. It is not a cryptocurrency wallet and does not hold user funds.

2. User Responsibility

Users are fully responsible for protecting their private keys and verifying transactions before signing.

3. No Financial Advice

All information is for security analysis purposes only and is not financial or legal advice.

4. Blockchain Risks

Blockchain interactions involve inherent risks. IBITI Guardian attempts to detect potential risks but cannot guarantee complete protection.

5. Limitation of Liability

IBITI Guardian and its developers are not liable for any financial loss or damages resulting from the use of the application.

6. Contact: info@ibiticoin.com
settingsDisclaimerContent:
Disclaimer – IBITI Guardian

Last updated: 2026

1. No Custody of Funds

IBITI Guardian does not hold, store, or control user funds. All transactions are executed directly through the user's connected wallet.

2. No Access to Private Keys

We never request or store private keys, seed phrases, or wallet passwords.

3. Informational Purposes Only

All information is for security purposes only and is not financial, investment, or legal advice.

4. Blockchain Risks

Blockchain transactions are irreversible. We attempt to detect risks but cannot guarantee complete protection against all threats.

5. Limitation of Liability

We are not responsible for financial losses resulting from blockchain interactions.

6. Contact: info@ibiticoin.com

onboardVaultBody: IBITI Guardian creates a single secure vault that works across all blockchains. Your keys stay private — always.
onboardEPKBody: Guardian reviews every transaction before it executes — blocking threats, flagging risks, and keeping your assets safe.
onboardReadyBody: Connect your wallet to activate Guardian protection. Your vault is end-to-end secured.
marketScoutThesisPullback: Short-term pullback with intact weekly structure. Good candidate for staggered entries if volatility is manageable.
marketScoutThesisMomentum: Strong momentum backed by real volume. Better suited for continuation trades or partial profit-taking logic.
marketScoutThesisBreakout: Explosive move with acceleration. High risk, high reward — fast entries only.
marketScoutThesisRotate: Healthy liquidity and tradable structure. Better for compare-and-rotate decisions or waiting for a cleaner setup.
aiDoingManual: I am monitoring the market and can explain any asset or signal. I am not allowed to prepare or execute trades.
aiDoingGuarded: I can build complete trade plans and prepare swaps within your mandate. Everything needs your approval before anything moves.
aiDoingFullExecuting: I am actively processing queued trades within your mandate. Every action passes policy and security checks before execution.
aiDoingFullReady: I am monitoring the market and ready to execute trades automatically within your mandate limits whenever a valid signal fires.
aiCannotManual: Cannot trade. Switch to Guarded or Full Autonomy to act.
aiCannotNoBalance: No stable balance detected. Add USDT, USDC, or DAI to enable buying.
aiCannotNarrowMandate: Only {asset} is in mandate. Other assets are blocked until mandate is updated.
aiNextManual: Go to AI Control → Switch to Guarded mode to start preparing trades.
aiNextNoBalance: Add stablecoins to your wallet — the AI needs a trading balance to act on signals.
aiNextGuarded: Review the top signals below. Tap any "Can Act" card to prepare a trade for approval.
aiNextExecuting: A trade is being processed. Check the Automation section below for details.
aiNextReady: The AI is watching for signals. Review triggers to adjust what it is monitoring.
blockExplainModeRestricted: You have not enabled auto-execution. The AI can only monitor and prepare plans — this is the correct protected state.
blockExplainOutsideMandate: The top signals include assets not listed in your mandate. Amend the allowed-assets list in AI Control to unlock them.
blockExplainLimitTooLow: The minimum trade size (gas floor) exceeds your per-trade cap. Raise the cap in AI Control to allow execution.
blockExplainNoBalance: The AI has no stable balance to work with. Add USDT, USDC, or DAI to your wallet to enable buying.
blockStillMonitoring: The AI is still monitoring all signals and will surface opportunities the moment restrictions are resolved.
modeRestrictedManualBody: The AI is watching the market and surfacing opportunities. Automatic execution is off by your choice — switch to Guarded mode to start preparing trades.
modeRestrictedGuardedBody: The AI has identified opportunities below. It can prepare complete trade plans for your review. Nothing executes without your tap.
signalAiMonitorOnly: AI is monitoring only — no auto-execution.
signalAiBlockedMandate: Blocked — asset not in mandate. Amend to unlock.
signalAiBlockedLimit: Blocked — raise per-trade cap to enable.
signalAiGuarded: AI can prepare this trade — you approve before it moves.
signalAiCanBuy: AI can prepare and execute this buy now.
signalAiCanTrade: AI can prepare and execute a trade for this asset.
aiControlModeManualDesc: Analysis, explanations, balances, risks — no execution.
aiControlModeGuardedDesc: AI opens screens, fills forms, prepares previews — user always confirms.
aiControlModeFullDesc: AI executes within limits, mandate, and EPK security.
aiControlModeLaw: AI cannot change its own limits, trusted scope, or policy.

riskDetailCriticalReason: This contract contains malicious code or is known to drain wallets.
riskDetailCriticalImpact: All funds in this asset can be stolen instantly without your permission.
riskDetailCriticalRecommendation: Revoke immediately. This is critically dangerous.
riskDetailWarningReason: Unlimited approval granted to an unverified or proxy contract.
riskDetailWarningImpact: The contract can spend an unlimited amount of your tokens.
riskDetailWarningRecommendation: Revoke to be safe, unless you actively use this contract.
riskDetailSafeReason: Standard approval to a known, safe protocol.
riskDetailSafeImpact: Low risk. Contract can only spend within normal operational bounds.
riskDetailSafeRecommendation: No action needed unless you want to clean up old approvals.
